## Acceptance criteria

<!-- What must be true for these tests to be considered complete? -->

- [ ] Test loads the page and verifies it is reachable
- [ ] Test verifies [specific element / behavior]
- [ ] Test is tagged `@functional` (or appropriate tag)
- [ ] Test passes in CI against the live site
